name: default
description: Fixed per-step request texts. The request is constant; only the response size varies. stateless resends steps 1..k each turn, stateful sends only step k.

steps.text: Turn 1. Summarize the benefits of unit testing in software engineering.
Turn 2. Now explain the difference between mocks and stubs.
Turn 3. Give an example of a flaky test and how to fix it.
Turn 4. What is test-driven development and its red-green-refactor loop?
Turn 5. How do you measure code coverage and what are its limits?
Turn 6. Explain contract testing between services.
Turn 7. When should you prefer integration tests over unit tests?
Turn 8. Summarize everything discussed so far in three bullet points.
